title: hypericum mutilum f. minus
intro: Hypericum mutilum f. minus, also known as Dwarf St. John's Wort or Small St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family, characterized by its small yellow flowers and dark green leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hypericum mutilum f. minus include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat anxiety and depression. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
